description: The Oral-B Pro 1000 electric toothbrush delivers a clinically proven superior clean vs. a regular manual toothbrush. Features a round brush head that surrounds each tooth for a dentist-like clean. The pressure sensor alerts you when you brush too hard. Includes one CrossAction replacement brush head. Compatible with all Oral-B replacement brush heads. Dentist recommended brand.
name: Oral-B Pro 1000 Electric Rechargeable Toothbrush

description: Colgate Total SF Whitening Gel Toothpaste provides 12-hour protection against bacteria on teeth, tongue, cheeks, and gums. Fights cavities, tartar, plaque, gingivitis, sensitivity, enamel erosion, bad breath, and stains — all in one formula. Formulated with stannous fluoride 0.454%. ADA Accepted for cavity protection. Clinically proven to reduce gingivitis in as little as four weeks. For best results, brush twice daily.
name: Colgate Total SF Whitening Gel Toothpaste

description: The Waterpik Aquarius Water Flosser is the #1 recommended water flosser brand by dental professionals. Removes up to 99.9% of plaque from treated areas and is proven to be 50% more effective than string floss for improving gum health around implants, braces, and crowns. Features 10 pressure settings and a 90-second water capacity reservoir. Includes 7 tips for the whole family. Ideal for patients with periodontal concerns, implants, or orthodontic appliances.
name: Waterpik Aquarius Water Flosser WP-660

description: GUM Soft-Picks Advanced are flexible rubber picks that gently remove plaque and food debris between teeth and along the gumline. The soft rubber bristles are gentler on gum tissue than wooden toothpicks. Slim tapered design fits easily between teeth of all sizes. No floss required — ideal for patients with dexterity challenges, implants, or wide interdental spaces. Available in regular and wide sizes. Carry case included for on-the-go use. 40 picks per pack.
name: GUM Soft-Picks Advanced Interdental Picks (40-Pack)

description: Sensodyne Pronamel Daily Protective Toothpaste is specifically formulated to protect against the effects of acid erosion while re-hardening acid-softened enamel. Contains 1450 ppm fluoride with potassium nitrate for sensitivity relief. Actively strengthens and re-hardens enamel with twice-daily brushing. Suitable for long-term use. Recommended for patients who frequently consume acidic foods and drinks, or who experience dentinal hypersensitivity. ADA Accepted.
name: Sensodyne Pronamel Daily Protective Toothpaste

description: Listerine Cool Mint Antiseptic Mouthwash kills 99.9% of germs that cause bad breath, plaque, and gingivitis. ADA Accepted. The essential oil formula fights plaque 5x better above the gumline vs. brushing alone. Use twice daily: rinse with 20 mL for 30 seconds after brushing. Not recommended for children under 12. 1.5 L bottle provides approximately 75 uses. Alcohol-based formula; alcohol-free version also available for patients with dry mouth concerns.
name: Listerine Cool Mint Antiseptic Mouthwash (1.5 L)

description: DenTek Triple Clean Floss Picks feature a tension-control floss that effectively removes plaque between teeth without shredding. Ergonomic handle provides an easy grip. Built-in tongue scraper helps reduce bad breath. Textured floss removes more plaque than ordinary floss picks. Ideal for on-the-go flossing. Mint flavored. Pack of 150. BPA-free. Recommended for patients transitioning to daily flossing who find traditional string floss difficult to manage.
name: DenTek Triple Clean Floss Picks (150-Pack)

description: Colgate Optic White Advanced Whitening Toothpaste uses hydrogen peroxide — the same whitening ingredient used by dentists — to remove up to 10 years of set-in stains. Contains 2% hydrogen peroxide, the highest level available in a whitening toothpaste. ADA Accepted for whitening. Use twice daily for best results; visible whitening in one week. Safe for daily use and gentle on enamel. Ideal for patients seeking professional-level whitening between office visits without the cost of in-office treatment.
name: Colgate Optic White Advanced Whitening Toothpaste
